polar and equatorial radii for Uranus's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
the models in this file assume the symmetric wind profile from Sromovsky et al. (2015, Icarus 258) Equation (2).
the distribution of models in this file comes from randomly drawing the gravity moments j2,j4 from a multivariate Gaussian from French et al. 2024 Table 17: Fit 15, Adopted solution.
